description: Visit https://check.torproject.org/, https://browserleaks.com/webrtc, https://browserleaks.com/canvas, and https://coveryourtracks.eff.org/ to evaluate Tor Browser's fingerprint resistance. Create a structured compatibility report at /home/ga/Documents/tor-compatibility-report.txt titled '=== TOR BROWSER COMPATIBILITY REPORT ===' including the current date. The report must include substantive observations based on the real test results for the following sections: '1. TOR CONNECTION STATUS' (including the exit IP), '2. WEBRTC LEAK TEST', '3. CANVAS FINGERPRINT TEST', '4. EFF COVER YOUR TRACKS', and '5. SUMMARY'.
